sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state to see if the dots were collected.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Check dots
for color in ['Y', 'b']:
    dots = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == color and n['pixels'] == 1]
    print(f"{color} dots: {len(dots)} at {[d['boundary'][0] for d in dots]}")

# Check white pixel
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White pixel at {node['boundary'][0]}")

# Check cross positions
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] in ['Y', 'b'] and node['pixels'] > 10:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"{node['color']} cross part: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
